meaning: n.修道院附属的教堂,大教堂
examples: See also the Muggle Encyclopedia entry for Wimborne Minster.
The plan was first championed by British Deputy Prime Minster Nick Clegg in January.
The English Gothic cathedrals include Canterbury, Lincoln, York Minster, and Exeter.
Beverley Minster's churchyard has been opened to the public for the first time since the early 19th century.
The Dean of York said the Minster was a major influence on national history.
